judgment.summary: High-growth, high-margin software business with strong cash flow that is currently trading at a very high valuation with negative net margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 0.25 beat the 0.23 estimate by 7.0%, with the next earnings date set for 2026-07-30.

Total cash $4.16B vs total debt $3.52B — strong liquidity position.
negatives: Forward P/E 131.46 — very high valuation relative to earnings.
